## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run release:gate`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:pack`

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No API keys, npm tokens, cookies, recovery codes, private video links, private transcripts, or customer data are included.
- [ ] Install examples use `@beta` unless this PR intentionally promotes a stable channel.
- [ ] Payment/credits claims match current README/product-site wording.
- [ ] MCP examples avoid placing API keys directly in shared config files or prompts.
